use_cases: Displaying user avatars in access management interfaces
Showing team members with profile images in dashboards
Representing users in permission settings panels
Rendering fallback initials when user images fail to load
ai_summary: A minimalist Avatar component built on Radix UI primitives for displaying user profile images with automatic fallback to initials. Exports Avatar, AvatarImage, and AvatarFallback components that can be composed into access management interfaces, team displays, and permission dashboards for SaaS and dev-tools platforms.
